name: Cyoda config watcher
description: Watches .cyoda/config for changes. Notifies Claude when credentials are updated after cyoda:auth or cyoda:setup.
command: sh -c 'PROJECT="$PWD"; echo "[cyoda-monitor] watching $PROJECT/.cyoda/config"; LAST=""; while true; do CUR=$(cat "$PROJECT/.cyoda/config" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$CUR" ] && [ "$CUR" != "$LAST" ]; then [ -n "$LAST" ] && echo "Cyoda config updated — connection status may have changed"; LAST="$CUR"; fi; sleep 5; done'
